☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ Valentino did manage to emerge victorious. So he called Vox and had him deal with the would-be killer for a short while as he dealt with his own wounds. He got one of his robots to clean him up, though the thin slit across his jugular wasn’t exactly pleasant. It was a reminder of how close they had actually gotten to killing him. Just the thought pissed him off beyond belief so he stormed over to Vox’s office and got him to share what he had learned.

Ah, so they were an assassin-for-hire? Interesting. It did take one of his tantrums but Valentino managed to convince Vox to let him interrogate the bastard himself. He was the one that almost died after all. He should decide how this little shit got treated. So they were dragged down to a sound-proof room on the basement level of the Vee Tower, the room completely empty save for the chair they were now tied down to. Actually, now that he actually got a decent look at them, they were.. pretty good looking. ❞
